column1: # Sample cohort: real companies from YC's recent 2026 batches

column3: AI-native observability that groups errors into one incident, then investigates with the logs, traces, and recent deploys
AI on-call engineer that responds to production incidents by analyzing logs, metrics, and traces to find root causes
AI agents that monitor every user at every account, tracking feature adoption, usage trends, and sentiment shifts
Task-driven AI agents that process unstructured patient records, pathology reports, and clinical notes at scale
AI that extracts the key terms from sales documents like Order Forms, MSAs, and POs to scale contract review
AI mobile wallet that picks the best credit card at checkout so you maximize points, miles, and cashback
